title: DURALEX - 4006AR06 Gigogne - set of 6 clear glass cups - 8 cm
features: Made of shock-proof and thermal shock tempered glass.
description: Product Description Duralex Le Gigogne: Unmatched Strength At Duralex, we have perfected the art of creating glasses of exceptional strength. Our know-how allows us to offer you lenses that are up to 6 times more resistant to mechanical shocks than average. Imagine the peace of mind it brings, knowing that your glasses will remain intact even when they suffer the vagaries of everyday life. In addition, our unique manufacturing process ensures that the colour of your lenses remains vibrant over time. The color pigments are directly embedded in the glass, which means that the color does not fade, thus becoming an integral part of the glass itself. The iconic Le Gigogne The Duralex Le Gigogne collection is a symbol of elegance and versatility. Its smooth and rounded shapes bring a warm and welcoming atmosphere to any table. These iconic glasses have conquered canteens, where schoolchildren compare their age thanks to the number engraved on the bottom of each glass, as well as the large tables in renowned restaurants. They embody the universality of design and are timeless, fitting perfectly into any decor. Durability and Functionality Duralex products are so much more than glasses. They are designed to meet your daily needs, whether serving water, juice, or even cocktails. However, our range is not limited to glasses. We offer a variety of products, ranging from salad bowls to verrines, coffee cups, saucers, and even smoothie glasses. These non-porous products are designed to resist stains, odors and corrosion. Duralex adapts to every aspect of your daily life, adding a touch of durability, functionality and elegance to every moment. Duralex Le Gigogne: The Art of Sharing Beyond their strength and aesthetics, Duralex Le Gigogne glasses evoke an art of living. They create a natural and warm atmosphere that brings people together, fostering strong relationships and unforgettable memories. In a family where children's rooms are not always tidy and where the dog still has not understood that he should not enter the house with wet paws full of mud, Le Gigogne relieves tension. The relaxed and friendly spirit put forward by Le Gigogne is a valuable asset in an ordinary and perfectly imperfect family. Join Duralex's tradition, where durability, functionality and usability come together to create a unique everyday experience. The quenching It is a process which consists in cooling the glass product brutally. This treatment makes Duralex glass at least 2.5 times stronger than a non-tempered glass product. It withstands thermal shock of at least 130 ° C.
